_meta.comment: English message bundle. Mirrors cs.json key-for-key.

CollectionProgress.title: The collection is being filled in

CollectionProgress.modalIntro: {count, plural, one {# find is} other {# finds are}} still missing across {ranges, plural, one {# range} other {# ranges}}. They're added gradually as the import progresses.

Home.intro: A public showcase of a private four-leaf clover collection — thousands of finds, recorded locations and GPS coordinates.
Home.donatedPrefix: Where luck has travelled so far:
Home.donatedAria: {count} donated clovers — show in the collection
Home.navSbirkaDesc: Gallery of every find with filters, search and detail.
Home.navLokalityDesc: All locations with polygons and find counts.
Home.navMapaDesc: Interactive map of locations and every find.
Home.navStatistikyDesc: Collection at a glance — charts, numbers and milestones.
Home.peakDayDuration: Time between the first and last find of that day
Home.netTimeTitleDay: Sum of the durations of individual 'sessions' across locations (pauses longer than 15 min are excluded)
Home.netTimeTitleLocation: Sum of the durations of individual 'sessions' at this location (pauses longer than 15 min are excluded)
Home.netTimeRateTitle: Average number of clovers per minute of net picking time
Home.netTimeRateTitleLocation: Average number of clovers per minute of net picking time at this location
Home.sparklineAria: Monthly activity over the last 12 months

FindDetail.formerLocationNotice: This location no longer physically exists (built over, terrain change, etc.). The map shows the original spot.
